name: Partial String Comparison
description: The product performs string comparisons that only examine a portion of the data before determining a match. An attacker could succeed in authentication by providing a short password that matches just the compared portion of the larger correct password.
detection_pattern: Look for INGRESS nodes carrying credentials flowing to AUTH nodes where the comparison logic (CONTROL) uses partial/prefix string matching (e.g., strncmp with short length) instead of full-length comparison. The mediator (full-length comparison) is missing.
